name: an architect-generated ADR flows through run-tool into the SARIF bus and yields a normalized verdict
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/architect.sh" 'build a booking service' --decisions-stub storage,auth --adr-out adrs --now 2026-06-20T00:00:00Z 2>/dev/null; ADR=$(ls adrs/*.md 2>/dev/null | head -1); RUN_TOOL_FORCE_ABSENT=1 bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/runners/run-tool.sh" --tool markdownlint --file "$ADR" --json 2>/dev/null > adr.sarif; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/sarif-aggregate.sh" --in adr.sarif 2>e.txt; grep -qE 'sarif-aggregate status=(green|red)' e.txt && echo architect-output-to-sarif-bus 1>&2
